params.name: Dead Sea Scrolls
params.description:
On Mar 23, 70 AD, many ancient scrolls were buried in the northwest of the Dead Sea.
1000 years ago, Moses led the enslaved Hebrews to the Dead Sea. But this lifeless sea was far from the "Promised Land" they were looking for. Moses did not give up as he believed that God would not forsake his people. The Hebrews recorded what Moses did on the sheepkin, "He found a dying sapling on the shore and dug a hole with his cane. He planted the sapling again along the coast, and the branches were cove …
